title: Work-unit
description: Formal schema for a work-unit per D20 (work-unit kind). Work-units are tracked instances of organized work in workspace state (D7 §3). Kind-discriminated; lifecycle status enum is fixed at framework-core. Notation: JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 per D28. Layer-3 formal schema per D11. Cross-kind referential integrity (e.g., kind resolves to a registered work-unit-kind; payload conforms to that kind's extension-declared payload schema; contributing-specialists support this kind) is out of scope per D28.

kind.description: Work-unit-kind identifier (D20). Open vocabulary per D29; values are extension-registered (fully-qualified <ext-id>:<id>).

status.description: Lifecycle phase. Fixed core enum (D20); extensions cannot add lifecycle states. Specific shape / specialist concerns (review flows, attestation, gates) are modeled as events within `in-progress`, not as separate states.

payload.description: Kind-specific content (D20). Framework doesn't validate payload shape at core; the work-unit-kind extension declaration provides a payload schema validated separately (per D29 vocabulary registration spec-ref).

contributing-actors.description: Actors operating on this work-unit, with role-tags per D9 + D13. Required slot; may be [] (per D13 required-with-explicit-empty pattern).

contributing-specialists.description: Specialists operating on this work-unit (D20). Each must have this work-unit's `kind` in its supported-work-unit-kinds (validated by framework conformance validator, not this schema). Required slot; may be [].

lifecycle.description: Timestamp markers (D20). Richer lifecycle history is derivable from events filtered by this work-unit's id (D23).
